skill_purpose: One sentence: what this skill helps users accomplish end-to-end.
target_audience: Who runs it (e.g. Cursor agent, CLI, human author) and their context.
pipeline_phases: Optional ordered phases the skill should follow (e.g. ingest → build → validate)
operator_expectations: Structural checks: compileall paths, build script, scanner list, rules/scanners.json bindings.
rules_and_scanners: How markdown rules map to scanner scripts for this skill.
constraints: Secrets, API limits, repo layout, or time constraints.
notes: Anything else the orchestrator or builder should respect.
